scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix host" "npm run start --prefix decide" "npm run start --prefix checkout" "npm run start --prefix blogs" "npm run start --prefix mfe-shared"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix host" "npm run dev --prefix decide" "npm run dev --prefix checkout" "npm run dev --prefix blogs" "npm run dev --prefix mfe-shared"
scripts.dev:wrangler: concurrently "npm run dev:wrangler --prefix host" "npm run dev --prefix decide" "npm run dev --prefix checkout" "npm run dev --prefix blogs" "npm run dev --prefix mfe-shared"
scripts.build: npm run sync-readme && npm run build:sequential
scripts.build:sequential: npm run build --prefix mfe-shared && npm run build --prefix host && npm run build --prefix decide && npm run build --prefix checkout && npm run build --prefix blogs
